sevenDayForecast.headline: Potential low (03U) forming well north of WA during next week.
points: Some model guidance indicates that a tropical low (03U) may form near Indonesia during next week.
Should a low form, the environmental conditions are generally favourable for development. The likelihood of a tropical cyclone forming increases to Low from Thursday onwards.
If 03U forms, the most likely movement is to the west southwest, remaining well to the northwest of the Kimberley coast.
